ExtensionDependency.description: Declared dependency on another extension. Enables cross-extension references using namespaced ids (otherExtensionId.entityId). Load order is topological; cycles are rejected.

allOf.description: Application extension: reusable bundle of entities, pages, navigation, workflows, roles, permissions, etc. Can be defined inside an application definition (extensionDefinitions) and released to the extension catalog. Authored with local ids; at merge time the platform namespaces all ids as extensionId.id. Data sources define structure only; connection/authentication supplied by the application or environment.

id.description: Unique extension identifier; used as namespace prefix when merged (e.g. employee).

dependsOn.description: Other extensions this extension references. Loaded first; cycles rejected.
